title: scratch_ui site manifest
description: Input -> output copy map that drives the buildhost site deploy: .github/workflows/preview.yml runs .github/scripts/assemble-pages.ts, which stages _site/ from pages-manifest.json. This schema mirrors exactly the constraints the assembly script enforces — no more.

$schema.description: Optional pointer at this schema, for editor tooling and validators.

entries.description: Each entry copies a repo file or directory (recursive) to a site path.

from.description: Input path, relative to the repo root (must not start with /).

to.description: Output site path (must start with /). '..' is rejected — the schema-level mirror of the assembly script's root-escape guard.
